/opt/homebrew/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc libdesktop_core.a CMakeFiles/desktop_core.dir/src/ui/DesktopApp.c.obj CMakeFiles/desktop_core.dir/src/ui/DesktopTheme.c.obj CMakeFiles/desktop_core.dir/src/ui/DesktopPages.c.obj CMakeFiles/desktop_core.dir/src/ui/DesktopAdapters.c.obj CMakeFiles/desktop_core.dir/src/ui/WorkbenchCommon.c.obj CMakeFiles/desktop_core.dir/src/ui/workbench/AdminWorkbench.c.obj CMakeFiles/desktop_core.dir/src/ui/workbench/AdminWorkbenchSupport.c.obj CMakeFiles/desktop_core.dir/src/ui/workbench/DoctorWorkbench.c.obj CMakeFiles/desktop_core.dir/src/ui/workbench/PatientWorkbench.c.obj CMakeFiles/desktop_core.dir/src/ui/workbench/InpatientWorkbench.c.obj CMakeFiles/desktop_core.dir/src/ui/workbench/WardWorkbench.c.obj CMakeFiles/desktop_core.dir/src/ui/workbench/PharmacyWorkbench.c.obj
